scope.intent: Clear remaining global entity-density gaps with source-backed people intake and works backfill.

people.name: Jerry Liu
people.description: Co-founder and CEO of LlamaIndex, a widely used data framework for RAG and agent applications.
people.whyImportant: LlamaIndex is a core open-source framework in the RAG ecosystem.

products.name: LlamaIndex
products.description: Open-source framework for connecting private or domain data to LLM applications.

sources.title: Jerry Liu GitHub profile
sources.text: Jerry Liu public GitHub profile, used as identity and avatar evidence for the LlamaIndex founder intake.

people.name: Omar Khattab
people.currentTitle: Assistant Professor @ MIT / Creator of ColBERT and DSPy
people.description: Researcher behind ColBERT and DSPy, with major work on neural retrieval and retrieval-augmented systems.
people.whyImportant: ColBERT and DSPy are core building blocks for modern retrieval and RAG systems.

products.name: ColBERT
products.description: Late-interaction neural retrieval model and open-source retrieval toolkit.

products.name: DSPy
products.description: Programming model for optimizing language-model pipelines, often used with retrieval workflows.

sources.title: Omar Khattab personal site
sources.text: Personal site for Omar Khattab; used as identity and research-area evidence.

sources.title: Omar Khattab GitHub profile
sources.text: GitHub profile used as avatar and open-source identity evidence.

people.name: Nils Reimers
people.description: Creator of Sentence Transformers, one of the most widely used embedding/retrieval toolkits for RAG systems.
people.whyImportant: Sentence Transformers provides embedding infrastructure used across semantic search and RAG stacks.

products.name: Sentence Transformers
products.description: Open-source Python framework for text embeddings and semantic search.

sources.title: Nils Reimers GitHub profile
sources.text: GitHub profile used as identity and avatar evidence for Nils Reimers.

sources.title: Sentence Transformers documentation
sources.text: Sentence Transformers documentation site; used as RAG retrieval infrastructure context.

people.name: Amjad Masad
people.description: Founder and CEO of Replit, whose AI products include agentic coding and software-building workflows.
